headline: 1 Healthcare Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, and their momentum is only rising as the industry has posted a 8.6% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 3.5 percentage points.

headline: 3 Reasons Boston Scientific Stock Could Quietly 5X as the World Ages

headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Raises Share Buyback Authorization To $5B
summary: Boston Scientific Corp. (NYSE:BSX) is one of the 15 best stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On February 24, Boston Scientific Corp. (NYSE:BSX) increased its share buyback authorization to $5 billion.
